languages.text: {n}Кажется, что Дунавски вытянулась в струнку еще сильнее:{/n} "Благодарю за оказанную честь, Ваша Светлость. Я знаю позицию, откуда открывается вид на дислокацию противника".
{n}Dunawski seems to stand up even straighter.{/n} "Thank you for the honour you have shown me, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I know of a position that offers a view of the enemy's location."
languages.original_text: {n}Кажется, что Дунавски вытянулась в струнку еще сильнее:{/n} "Благодарю за оказанную честь, Ваша Светлость. Я знаю позицию, откуда открывается вид на дислокацию противника".

"Thank you for the honour you have shown me, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I know of a position that offers a view of the enemy's position."

{n}Dunawski seems to stand up even straighter.{/n} "Thank you for the honour you have shown me, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I know of a position that offers a view of the enemy's location."

languages.text: {n}ダナウスキはさらに背筋を伸ばしているようである。{/n}{br}"貴方の御恩に感謝いたします。敵の陣地が見える場所を知っております。"
languages.original_text:
{n}Dunawski seems to stand up even straighter.{/n}{br}
"Thank you for the honour you have shown me, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I know of a position that offers a view of the enemy's position."

traits.locale_text: ダナウスキはさらに背筋を伸ばしているようである。{br}"貴方の御恩に感謝いたします。敵の陣地が見える場所を知っております。"

languages.text: {n}Dunawski, vücudunu iyice dikleştiriyor gibi görünüyor.{/n} "Bana bahşettiğiniz onur için teşekkür ederim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Düşmanın konumunu gören bir yer biliyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski seems to stand up even straighter.{/n} "Thank you for the honour you have shown me, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I know of a position that offers a view of the enemy's location."

traits.locale_text: {n}Dunawski, vücudunu iyice dikleştiriyor gibi görünüyor.{/n} "Bana bahşettiğiniz onur için teşekkür ederim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Düşmanın konumunu gören bir yer biliyorum."

languages.text: {n}Dunawski parece erguirse aún más.{/n} «Gracias por el honor que me ha concedido, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Conozco un lugar que ofrece buenas vistas de la posición del enemigo».
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski seems to stand up even straighter.{/n} "Thank you for the honour you have shown me, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I know of a position that offers a view of the enemy's location."

traits.locale_text: {n}Dunawski parece erguirse aún más.{/n} «Gracias por el honor que me ha concedido, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Conozco un lugar que ofrece buenas vistas de la posición del enemigo».

languages.text: {n}杜纳芙斯卡的腰似乎挺得更直了。{/n}“感谢您给予我此等殊荣，大人。我知道一个位置，可以观察到敌人的方位。”
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski seems to stand up even straighter.{/n} "Thank you for the honour you have shown me, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I know of a position that offers a view of the enemy's location."

traits.locale_text: {n}杜纳芙斯卡的腰似乎挺得更直了。{/n}“感谢您给予我此等殊荣，大人。我知道一个位置，可以观察到敌人的方位。”

languages.text: {n}Dunawski semble se tenir encore plus droite.{/n} « Merci pour cet honneur, Votre Seigneurie. Je connais un endroit qui nous permettra d'observer la position de l'ennemi. »
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski seems to stand up even straighter.{/n} "Thank you for the honour you have shown me, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I know of a position that offers a view of the enemy's location."

traits.locale_text: {n}Dunawski semble se tenir encore plus droite.{/n} « Merci pour cet honneur, Votre Seigneurie. Je connais un endroit qui nous permettra d'observer la position de l'ennemi. »

languages.text: {n}Dunawski scheint nun noch strammer zu stehen.{/n} "Danke für die Ehre, die Ihr mir erwiesen habt, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich kenne eine Stelle, von der wir die Position des Feindes gut überblicken können."
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski seems to stand up even straighter.{/n} "Thank you for the honour you have shown me, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I know of a position that offers a view of the enemy's location."

traits.locale_text: {n}Dunawski scheint nun noch strammer zu stehen.{/n} "Danke für die Ehre, die Ihr mir erwiesen habt, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich kenne eine Stelle, von der wir die Position des Feindes gut überblicken können."
